channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-04-14 02:30 — Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band at Chase Center. Bruce Springsteen's live performances are legendary, making this a must-see event for rock fans.

item.title: Royel Otis @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-04-17 02:00 — Royel Otis at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Royel Otis is gaining traction with their unique sound, making this tour an exciting opportunity to catch them live.

item.title: The Strokes @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-07 02:30 — The Strokes at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Strokes are known for their electrifying live shows, and this performance is sure to draw a large crowd.

item.title: FKA twigs @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-08 03:00 — FKA twigs at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. FKA twigs is a captivating performer with a strong reputation for her innovative live shows.

item.title: Gillian Welch & David Rawlings @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-18 03:00 → 2026-04-19 03:00 — Gillian Welch & David Rawlings at Fox Theater - Oakland. Gillian Welch & David Rawlings offer a unique acoustic experience that appeals to folk and Americana fans.

item.title: Sticky Fingers @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-04-07 03:00 — Sticky Fingers at The Masonic. Sticky Fingers brings a vibrant energy to their performances, making this show a great pick for indie rock fans.

item.title: Hatsune Miku @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-04-23 03:00 — Hatsune Miku at San Jose Civic. Behemoth is known for their intense live performances, making this a must-see for metal fans.

item.title: Demi Lovato @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-12 03:00 — Demi Lovato at Chase Center. Demi Lovato's upcoming tour promises to deliver a powerful performance with a strong emotional connection.

item.title: Rene Liu @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Rene Liu at SAP Center at San Jose. Kesha's upcoming tour is expected to be a fun and energetic experience for fans.

item.title: Lewis Capaldi @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-04 02:00 — Lewis Capaldi at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Lewis Capaldi's heartfelt ballads and engaging stage presence make this concert a must-attend.

item.title: Alabama Shakes @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-30 03:00 → 2026-05-31 03:00 — Alabama Shakes at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Alabama Shakes are known for their soulful sound and dynamic performances, making this a highly anticipated show.

item.title: James Blake @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-12 02:00 — James Blake at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. James Blake's unique sound and emotional performances are sure to resonate with fans.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses is known for their captivating live shows, blending electronic and live instrumentation.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise's energetic performances and eclectic sound make this a standout show.

item.title: Young the Giant @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-20 01:00 — Young the Giant at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Young the Giant's live shows are known for their high energy and engaging performances.

item.title: Escape the Fate Vip @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-04-08 00:00 — Escape the Fate Vip at The Fillmore .

item.title: Dancing with the Stars @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-04-18 23:00 — Dancing with the Stars at San Jose Civic.
